source_pr.title: tidb: move tidb/*.go to session directory
source_pr.body:
As suggested by @ngaut , we already have so many files (like Makefile LICENSE *.sh *.md) in tidb directory.
This change makes our top level directory cleaner.

PTAL @coocood

symptoms: fix a data race in test
failure_signature: fix a data race in test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race in test code: a mockResponse used in distsql tests mutated shared state (count) from methods that could be called concurrently (e.g., Next/Close), without synchronization. This PR adds a mutex to mockResponse and guards the state access to eliminate the race.
fix_pattern: Guard test mocks with sync.Mutex (or other synchronization) to avoid data races under concurrent access.

evidence: evidence: fix a data race in test

files: Makefile, cmd/benchdb/main.go, ddl/ddl_db_change_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/table_split_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/show_stats_test.go, executor/show_test.go, executor/simple_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, expression/typeinfer_test.go, mysql/const_test.go, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/preprocess_test.go, privilege/privileges/cache_test.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/driver_tidb.go, server/http_handler.go, server/http_handler_test.go, server/statistics_handler.go, server/statistics_handler_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session/bench_test.go, session/bootstrap.go, session/bootstrap_test.go, session/session.go, session/session_fail_test.go, session/session_test.go, session/tidb.go, session/tidb_test.go, session/txn.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, statistics/handle_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go, store/tikv/gcworker/gc_worker.go, store/tikv/gcworker/gc_worker_test.go, store/tikv/sql_fail_test.go, table/tables/memory_tables_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, tidb-server/main.go, util/admin/admin_test.go, util/kvencoder/kv_encoder.go, util/kvencoder/kv_encoder_test.go, util/ranger/ranger_test.go, util/sqlexec/restricted_sql_executor.go, util/testkit/testkit.go, store/tikv/scan_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, session/isolation_test.go, store/mockstore/mocktikv/cop_handler_dag.go, util/mock/context.go, distsql/distsql_test.go
